info: M1s apply a second instance of Frostdraw damage that deals 4% of the scaled damage of attack that procced it. Additionally, apply Crystals on M1 if you have the Crystallization path. After hitting a target (LHT: 5, MED: 4, HVY: 3) times, apply Bottom Freeze and Chill for 2 seconds. This also increases Chilling's secondary Frostdraw damage instance to 10% of your scaled damage, on that hit. 5 second cooldown. If the target is a PvE enemy, additionally apply Sluggish, reducing their damage to you for the duration of the slow. Chilling's damage does not benefit from damage modifiers. Chilling stacks can also be gained from critical attacks if they have the M1 tag.
name: Chilling
in_game_desc: Chill for foes. Applies Bottom Freeze once enough stacks have been applied.
